# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest release of `vaslv/filament-topbar-menu` receives security fixes.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x     | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

Instead, use one of the private channels:

- [GitHub private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/vaslv/filament-topbar-menu/security/advisories/new)
- Email: vaslv@proton.me

Include as much detail as possible: affected version, steps to reproduce, and
potential impact. You will receive a response within a few days. Once the issue
is confirmed, a fix will be released as soon as possible and credited to you
unless you prefer to stay anonymous.
